meta.game: Charlotte Hornets at New York Knicks

CHA.headline: Checkmates and closeouts: Inside the NBA's quiet chess boom
CHA.description: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

CHA.headline: New York faces Charlotte, looks for 8th straight home win
CHA.description: Charlotte Hornets (43-38, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. New York Knicks (53-28, third in the Eastern Conference)

CHA.headline: Detroit Pistons vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights
CHA.description: Detroit Pistons vs. Charlotte Hornets: Game Highlights

CHA.headline: Jalen Duren scores 20 points and the Detroit Pistons beat the Charlotte Hornets 118-100
CHA.description: — Jalen Duren had 20 points, Duncan Robinson scored 19 and the Detroit Pistons beat Charlotte 118-100 on Friday night, locking the Hornets into the play-in tournament.

CHA.headline: Ball, Hornets take on the Pistons
CHA.description: Detroit Pistons (58-22, first in the Eastern Conference) vs. Charlotte Hornets (43-37, ninth in the Eastern Conference)

NY.headline: New York faces Charlotte, looks for 8th straight home win
NY.description: Charlotte Hornets (43-38, ninth in the Eastern Conference) vs. New York Knicks (53-28, third in the Eastern Conference)

NY.headline: NBA's Friday slate sees at least 168 out with injury or illness
NY.description: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

NY.headline: Knicks beat Raptors for 13th straight time and wrap up No. 3 seed in the Eastern Conference
NY.description: — Jalen Brunson scored 29 points, Karl-Anthony Towns finished with 22 points and 10 rebounds, and the New York Knicks clinched the No. 3 seed in the Eastern Conference with their 13th consecutive victory over the Toronto Raptors, 112-95 on Friday night.

NY.headline: Toronto Raptors vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights
NY.description: Toronto Raptors vs. New York Knicks: Game Highlights

NY.headline: Kendrick Perkins: Celtics still Eastern Conference favorites over Knicks
NY.description: Kendrick Perkins explains why the Knicks’ 112-106 win over the Celtics does not mean New York is the favorite coming out of the Eastern Conference.
